darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture (darkness axenic+coculture)
darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.functional_description: Transcripts still detectable at 72-144h in both axenic and coculture conditions include RNA polymerase subunits, ATP synthase components, photosystem I and II genes, ribosomal proteins, RuBisCO, central carbon metabolism enzymes, and chaperones.
darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.temporal_pattern: Transcripts persisting through 72-144h of extended darkness in both culture conditions.
darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.expression_dynamics: present in axenic and coculture during extended darkness
darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.confidence_notes: Functional description from page 13 of the paper (late survival transcript inventory). Earlier quotes about 5h response were removed as they describe a different biological context.
darkness_axenic+darkness_coculture.assessment_notes: Original extraction conflated early darkness response (5h, Tables 1-2) with late survival classification (72-144h, Table S5).

darkness_axenic+unique_axenic.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster darkness_axenic+unique_axenic (darkness axenic+unique axenic)
darkness_axenic+unique_axenic.temporal_pattern: Transcripts detectable at 72-144h only in axenic cultures.
darkness_axenic+unique_axenic.expression_dynamics: present in axenic and unique to axenic during extended darkness
darkness_axenic+unique_axenic.confidence_notes: Paper does not provide specific functional description for the axenic-unique late survival set. Original extraction incorrectly used early-response data (5h, Tables 1/S3) for a late-survival cluster (72-144h, Table S5).
darkness_axenic+unique_axenic.assessment_notes: Original extraction conflated early darkness response (5h) with late survival classification (72-144h).

darkness_coculture+unique_coculture.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster darkness_coculture+unique_coculture (darkness coculture+unique coculture)
darkness_coculture+unique_coculture.temporal_pattern: Transcripts detectable at 72-144h only in coculture conditions, suggesting heterotroph presence maintains additional transcript pools.
darkness_coculture+unique_coculture.expression_dynamics: present in coculture and unique to coculture during extended darkness
darkness_coculture+unique_coculture.confidence_notes: Table 2 content (organic compound degradation, terpenoid biosynthesis) describes the early darkness response (5h), not the late survival classification (72-144h). Original extraction incorrectly applied early-response data to this late-survival cluster.
darkness_coculture+unique_coculture.assessment_notes: Original extraction conflated early darkness response (5h, Table 2) with late survival classification (72-144h, Table S5).
